---
  title: "Module II"
---
  
  # Introduction to R for Public Health Surveillance
  
  ## Learning Objectives
  
  Participants will:
  
  - Understand R fundamentals
- Manipulate data efficiently
- Produce visualizations
- Generate reports

## Topics

### Introduction to R

### Data Management using tidyverse

### Data Visualization using ggplot2

### Epidemiological Analysis

### Automated Reporting

## Practical Sessions

- Importing datasets
- Cleaning surveillance data
- Building surveillance reports
